cards.heading: Production systems, not prototypes
cards.body: Launch-ready systems with CI/CD, auth, observability, and runbooks — not throwaway demos.

cards.heading: Cloud-native from day one
cards.body: Terraform IaC, containerised services, zero-downtime deploys, AWS/GCP parity, Azure-ready.

cards.heading: You own what I build
cards.body: Clean code, architecture decision records, full handoff runbook — no black boxes, no lock-in.

cards.heading: Regulated-environment execution
cards.body: Finance/FinTech and government-focused cloud security background keeps delivery audit-ready.

cards.heading: Fixed scope, fixed price
cards.body: Written proposal before any work begins. No surprises. Retainer support available post-delivery.

cards.heading: Secure by default
cards.body: JWT/RBAC, secrets management, least-privilege IAM, and audit logging at every layer.
